s0_init.png.step_retrieval_summary: LibreOffice Impress is active with slide 1 selected in the slide pane. The Properties sidebar is open on “Slide,” with the Layouts grid visible and the blank layout highlighted. No object on the canvas is selected; slide-level controls like Format/Orientation and “Insert Image” (Background) are available.

s1_after_double_click.png.step_retrieval_summary: LibreOffice Impress in Normal view with slide 1 selected. Properties sidebar is open to Slide settings; the Layouts grid is visible with the blank layout highlighted/selected. No text box is active on the canvas (slide-level editing).

s2_after_press.png.step_retrieval_summary: LibreOffice Impress in Normal view. The bulleted text box on the slide is selected with text active for editing. Properties sidebar is open with Character (font size 18 pt) and Lists/Paragraph controls (bullets and alignment/indent) available for adjustment.

s3_after_click.png.step_retrieval_summary: LibreOffice Impress (Normal view) with a slide open. A bulleted text box on the slide is selected with its text highlighted for editing. The Properties sidebar is open, showing Character (32 pt), Lists (bullets), and Paragraph spacing/indent controls for formatting.

s4_after_press.png.step_retrieval_summary: LibreOffice Impress in Normal view on Slide 1. A bulleted text box on the slide is selected with its text highlighted for editing. The Properties sidebar is open with Character (32 pt), Lists (bullets), and Paragraph controls visible.

s5_after_typing.png.step_retrieval_summary: LibreOffice Impress with Slide 1 open. The bullet text box on the slide is selected and its text is highlighted for editing. Properties sidebar is open to Character/Paragraph; the font size field is focused (12) with list and spacing controls visible.

s6_after_press.png.step_retrieval_summary: LibreOffice Impress in Normal view editing a slide. The content text box is active with a bulleted paragraph selected (text highlighted) under the “Neural Network” slide. Properties sidebar is open on the right (Character/Lists/Paragraph) for formatting changes.

s7_after_click.png.step_retrieval_summary: LibreOffice Impress (Normal view) with the body text in a slide’s text box fully selected. The Properties sidebar (Character) is active and the font color picker dropdown is expanded, ready to choose a new text color.

s8_after_click.png.step_retrieval_summary: LibreOffice Impress is open in Normal view on a slide. The body text box is selected with its bullet text highlighted for editing. The Properties sidebar is open with Character/Paragraph controls visible, including font size (12 pt) and bullets/indent settings for formatting.

s9_after_click.png.step_retrieval_summary: LibreOffice Impress in Normal view with slide 1 selected in the thumbnails. The Properties sidebar is open to “Slide,” showing the Layouts grid with the first layout tile selected. No text box is active on the canvas; focus is on slide layout/properties.

s10_after_click.png.step_retrieval_summary: LibreOffice Impress is in Normal view with slide 1 active. A right‑click context menu on the slide canvas is open, offering Layout, Slide Transition, and Slide Properties. The Properties sidebar (Slide) is visible with layout thumbnails; Master Background and Master Objects are checked, and no text box is selected.

s11_after_click.png.step_retrieval_summary: LibreOffice Impress with the Slide Properties modal open on the Background tab. Background type is set to Color with the standard color palette visible and the “New” color fields showing white. Actions: choose a color (or switch to None/Gradient/Image), then confirm with OK (or Cancel/Reset).

s12_after_click.png.step_retrieval_summary: LibreOffice Impress with the Slide Properties dialog open on the Background tab. Background type is Color; the color palette is active with red selected and shown in the New preview (RGB 255,0,0). Primary actions: OK to apply, or Cancel/Reset.

s13_after_click.png.step_retrieval_summary: LibreOffice Impress in Normal view with slide 1 selected. Properties sidebar is open on Slide; Background is set to Color: Red. Layouts panel shows the Blank layout selected.

s14_after_press.png.step_retrieval_summary: LibreOffice Impress is open in Normal view with Slide 1 active. The Properties sidebar is on “Slide,” with Background set to Color: Red. In Layouts, the blank layout tile is selected; no text object is currently focused.
